item.title: "No way to prevent this" say users of only language where this regularly happens
"No way to prevent this" say users of only language where this regularly happens
Amazonbot is finally respecting robots.txt
item.description: Thanks for giving me a viable business model Amazon!

item.title: I'm really frustrated that GitLab is doing layoffs
item.description: Winning at this could have been so easy

item.title: Maybe you shouldn't install new software for a bit
item.description: Oh boy yet more linux kernel vulns

item.title: Claude Code won April Fools Day this year
item.description: They gave people a heckin tamagochi, what's not to like?

item.title: Small note about AI 'GPUs'
item.description: They are graphical processing units that can't process graphics.

item.title: Homelab downtime update: The fight for DNS supremacy
item.description: Turns out everything DID NOT go offline somehow. Yay!

item.title: My homelab will be down for at least 20 days
item.description: Dang, guess I have to suffer.

item.title: I don't know if I like working at higher levels of abstraction
item.description: AI tools push us to higher abstraction. I'm not sure I like what that costs us.
